---
title: "CHAT_ANALYSIS"
output: html_document
---
```{r setup}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(readxl)
library(stringr)
library(openxlsx)

# 1️⃣ Read Excel
df <- read_excel(
  "~/Desktop/Lab_Streeter_new/EpicCosmicData/Latest/Epic Cosmos Master HOA Data Final.xlsx",
  sheet = "Diagnoses + Medications"
)

names(df)[1] <- "Group_Info"
names(df) <- make.names(names(df))

# 2️⃣ Extract Group / Sex / Age
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Group = case_when(
      str_detect(Group_Info, "^HOA") ~ "HOA",
      str_detect(Group_Info, "^Normal") ~ "Normal"
    ),
    Sex = case_when(
      str_detect(Group_Info, "Males") ~ "Male",
      str_detect(Group_Info, "Females") ~ "Female"
    ),
    Age = str_extract(Group_Info, "\\d+-\\d+|80\\+")
  )

# 3️⃣ Separate prevalence and CI rows
prev_df <- df %>%
  filter(!str_detect(Group_Info, "95% CI"))

ci_df <- df %>%
  filter(str_detect(Group_Info, "95% CI")) %>%
  mutate(Group_Info = str_remove(Group_Info, " 95% CI"))

# 4️⃣ Identify outcome columns
meta <- c("Group_Info", "Group", "Sex", "Age", "Number.of.patients")
outcomes <- setdiff(names(prev_df), meta)

# Convert to numeric (remove % if present)
prev_df[outcomes] <- lapply(prev_df[outcomes], function(x) {
  x <- gsub("%", "", x)
  x <- gsub(",", "", x)
  as.numeric(x)
})

ci_df[outcomes] <- lapply(ci_df[outcomes], function(x) {
  x <- gsub("%", "", x)
  x <- gsub(",", "", x)
  as.numeric(x)
})

# 5️⃣ Pivot to long format
prev_long <- prev_df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(outcomes),
    names_to = "Outcome",
    values_to = "Prev"
  )

ci_long <- ci_df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(outcomes),
    names_to = "Outcome",
    values_to = "CI"
  )

# 6️⃣ Join prevalence and CI
long <- prev_long %>%
  left_join(
    ci_long %>% select(Group, Sex, Age, Outcome, CI),
    by = c("Group", "Sex", "Age", "Outcome")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    # Convert CI to halfwidth in percentage points (document methodology)
    CI_halfwidth = ifelse(CI < 1, CI * 100, CI),
    # Calculate SE from CI halfwidth
    SE = CI_halfwidth / 1.96
  )

# 🔹 Extract Combined rows (sex not specified)
combined_long <- prev_long %>%
  filter(str_detect(Group_Info, "Combined")) %>%
  mutate(
    Group = case_when(
      str_detect(Group_Info, "^HOA") ~ "HOA",
      str_detect(Group_Info, "^Normal") ~ "Normal"
    ),
    Age = str_extract(Group_Info, "\\d+-\\d+|80\\+")
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    ci_long %>%
      filter(str_detect(Group_Info, "Combined")) %>%
      select(Group, Age, Outcome, CI),
    by = c("Group", "Age", "Outcome")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    CI_halfwidth = ifelse(CI < 1, CI * 100, CI),
    SE = CI_halfwidth / 1.96
  )

hc <- combined_long %>%
  filter(Group=="HOA") %>%
  rename(Prev_hc=Prev, SE_hc=SE)

nc <- combined_long %>%
  filter(Group=="Normal") %>%
  rename(Prev_nc=Prev, SE_nc=SE)

# 7️⃣ Split strata for contrasts
hm <- long %>% filter(Group=="HOA", Sex=="Male") %>% 
  rename(Prev_hm=Prev, SE_hm=SE)
cm <- long %>% filter(Group=="Normal", Sex=="Male") %>% 
  rename(Prev_cm=Prev, SE_cm=SE)
hf <- long %>% filter(Group=="HOA", Sex=="Female") %>% 
  rename(Prev_hf=Prev, SE_hf=SE)
cf <- long %>% filter(Group=="Normal", Sex=="Female") %>% 
  rename(Prev_cf=Prev, SE_cf=SE)

# 8️⃣ Join all strata
joined <- hm %>%
  full_join(cm, by=c("Age","Outcome")) %>%
  full_join(hf, by=c("Age","Outcome")) %>%
  full_join(cf, by=c("Age","Outcome"))

combined_per_age <- hc %>%
  full_join(nc, by=c("Age","Outcome")) %>%
  mutate(
    HOA_Combined = Prev_hc - Prev_nc,
    se_HOA_Combined = sqrt(SE_hc^2 + SE_nc^2)
  )

# 9️⃣ Calculate per-age contrasts
per_age <- joined %>%
  mutate(
    HOA_Males = Prev_hm - Prev_cm,
    se_HOA_Males = sqrt(SE_hm^2 + SE_cm^2),
    HOA_Females = Prev_hf - Prev_cf,
    se_HOA_Females = sqrt(SE_hf^2 + SE_cf^2),
    Controls = Prev_cf - Prev_cm,
    se_Controls = sqrt(SE_cf^2 + SE_cm^2),
    Interaction = (Prev_hf - Prev_cf) - (Prev_hm - Prev_cm),
    se_Interaction = sqrt((SE_hf^2 + SE_cf^2) + (SE_hm^2 + SE_cm^2))
  )

# 🔟 IVW pooling function
ivw_pool <- function(effects, ses) {
  ok <- !is.na(effects) & !is.na(ses) & ses > 0
  effects <- effects[ok]
  ses <- ses[ok]
  k <- length(effects)
  if (k == 0) {
    return(tibble(Age_bins=NA, Beta_pp=NA, CI_low=NA, CI_high=NA, p=NA))
  }
  w <- 1 / (ses^2)
  beta <- sum(w * effects) / sum(w)
  se <- sqrt(1 / sum(w))
  z <- beta / se
  p <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(z)))
  tibble(
    Age_bins = k,
    Beta_pp = beta,
    CI_low = beta - 1.96 * se,
    CI_high = beta + 1.96 * se,
    p = p
  )
}

# 1️⃣1️⃣ Pool per outcome
res <- per_age %>%
  group_by(Outcome) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    bind_rows(
      ivw_pool(.x$Controls, .x$se_Controls) %>% mutate(Effect="Controls"),
      ivw_pool(.x$HOA_Females, .x$se_HOA_Females) %>% mutate(Effect="HOA_Females"),
      ivw_pool(.x$HOA_Males, .x$se_HOA_Males) %>% mutate(Effect="HOA_Males"),
      ivw_pool(.x$Interaction, .x$se_Interaction) %>% mutate(Effect="Interaction")
    )
  }) %>%
  ungroup()

# Add Combined analysis
combined_res <- combined_per_age %>%
  group_by(Outcome) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    ivw_pool(.x$HOA_Combined, .x$se_HOA_Combined) %>%
      mutate(Effect="HOA_Combined")
  }) %>%
  ungroup()

res <- bind_rows(res, combined_res)

# 1️⃣2️⃣ BH correction
res <- res %>%
  group_by(Effect) %>%
  mutate(q_BH = p.adjust(p, "BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

# 1️⃣3️⃣ Wide format
final_output <- res %>%
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols = Outcome,
    names_from = Effect,
    values_from = c(Age_bins, Beta_pp, CI_low, CI_high, p, q_BH),
    names_sep = "_"
  ) %>%
  # Filter out completely empty rows
  filter(!is.na(Beta_pp_Controls) | !is.na(Beta_pp_HOA_Females) | 
         !is.na(Beta_pp_HOA_Males) | !is.na(Beta_pp_Interaction) |
  !is.na(Beta_pp_HOA_Combined)) %>%
  # Reorder columns
  select(
    Outcome,
    Age_bins_Controls, Beta_pp_Controls, CI_low_Controls, CI_high_Controls, 
    p_Controls, q_BH_Controls,
    Age_bins_HOA_Females, Beta_pp_HOA_Females, CI_low_HOA_Females, CI_high_HOA_Females,
    p_HOA_Females, q_BH_HOA_Females,
    Age_bins_HOA_Males, Beta_pp_HOA_Males, CI_low_HOA_Males, CI_high_HOA_Males,
    p_HOA_Males, q_BH_HOA_Males,
    Age_bins_Interaction, Beta_pp_Interaction, CI_low_Interaction, CI_high_Interaction,
    p_Interaction, q_BH_Interaction,
    Age_bins_HOA_Combined, Beta_pp_HOA_Combined, CI_low_HOA_Combined, CI_high_HOA_Combined,
    p_HOA_Combined, q_BH_HOA_Combined
  )

# 1️⃣4️⃣ Create Excel with formatted headers
wb <- createWorkbook()
addWorksheet(wb, "Results")

# Write header row 1
writeData(wb, 1, "Outcome", startCol = 1, startRow = 1)
writeData(wb, 1, "Female vs Male (Controls)", startCol = 2, startRow = 1)
writeData(wb, 1, "HOA Effect in Females", startCol = 8, startRow = 1)
writeData(wb, 1, "HOA Effect in Males", startCol = 14, startRow = 1)
writeData(wb, 1, "HOA > Female Interaction", startCol = 20, startRow = 1)
writeData(wb, 1, "HOA Combined (All Sexes)", startCol = 26, startRow = 1)

# Merge cells
mergeCells(wb, 1, cols = 2:7, rows = 1)
mergeCells(wb, 1, cols = 8:13, rows = 1)
mergeCells(wb, 1, cols = 14:19, rows = 1)
mergeCells(wb, 1, cols = 20:25, rows = 1)
mergeCells(wb, 1, cols = 26:31, rows = 1)

# Write header row 2
col_names <- c("Outcome",
               "Age bins (n)", "β (pp)", "CI low", "CI high", "p", "q (BH)",
               "Age bins (n)", "β (pp)", "CI low", "CI high", "p", "q (BH)",
               "Age bins (n)", "β (pp)", "CI low", "CI high", "p", "q (BH)",
               "Age bins (n)", "β (pp)", "CI low", "CI high", "p", "q (BH)",
               "Age bins (n)", "β (pp)", "CI low", "CI high", "p", "q (BH)")

writeData(wb, 1, t(col_names), startRow = 2, colNames = FALSE)

# Format data for writing - CONVERT TO STRINGS FIRST, THEN WRITE
data_to_write <- final_output %>%
  mutate(
    # Round numeric columns to 2 decimals (keep as numeric for now)
    across(c(Beta_pp_Controls, CI_low_Controls, CI_high_Controls,
             Beta_pp_HOA_Females, CI_low_HOA_Females, CI_high_HOA_Females,
             Beta_pp_HOA_Males, CI_low_HOA_Males, CI_high_HOA_Males,
             Beta_pp_Interaction, CI_low_Interaction, CI_high_Interaction,
             Beta_pp_HOA_Combined, CI_low_HOA_Combined, CI_high_HOA_Combined), 
           ~round(., 2)),
    
    # Convert ALL p and q_BH values to character strings with scientific notation
    across(c(p_Controls, p_HOA_Females, p_HOA_Males, p_Interaction, p_HOA_Combined,
             q_BH_Controls, q_BH_HOA_Females, q_BH_HOA_Males, q_BH_Interaction, q_BH_HOA_Combined),
           ~if_else(is.na(.), NA_character_, sprintf("%.3E", .)))
  )

# Write data
writeData(wb, 1, data_to_write, startRow = 3, colNames = FALSE)

# Create text style for p and q(BH) columns
textStyle <- createStyle(numFmt = "TEXT")

# Apply text format to p and q(BH) columns (columns 5, 6, 11, 12, 17, 18, 23, 24, 29, 30)
p_qBH_cols <- c(5, 6, 11, 12, 17, 18, 23, 24, 29, 30)
for (col in p_qBH_cols) {
  addStyle(wb, 1, textStyle, rows = 3:(3 + nrow(data_to_write) - 1), cols = col, 
           gridExpand = TRUE, stack = TRUE)
}

# Style headers
headerStyle <- createStyle(
  fontColour = "black",
  fgFill = "#D3D3D3",
  halign = "center",
  valign = "center",
  textDecoration = "bold",
  border = "TopBottomLeftRight"
)

# Apply to ALL 31 columns
addStyle(wb, 1, headerStyle, rows = 1:2, cols = 1:31, gridExpand = TRUE)

# Save
saveWorkbook(wb, 
             "~/Desktop/Lab_Streeter_new/EpicCosmicData/Latest/HOA_Pooled_IVW_CI_Based.xlsx",
             overwrite = TRUE)

print("Analysis complete using CI-derived standard errors!")
print(paste("Number of outcomes:", nrow(final_output)))
```
